title: Wire runtime mutation approval enforcement
goal: Extend Approval Path v1 from the declared runtime_mutation class to concrete runtime, service, deploy or restart mutation paths.

acceptance.assertion: Runtime, service, deploy or restart mutation paths either enforce runtime_mutation approval or explicitly route to an existing stronger runtime operator gate.
Runtime mutation attempts fail closed without sufficient break_glass approval or an explicitly documented stronger substitute gate.

metadata.reason: Approval Path v1 defines runtime_mutation as an unsafe class, but T004 wires repository mutation, agent dispatch, reviewed source import, queue mutation and external task creation only.
does_not_establish: runtime deploy or restart paths are safe by default
approval path covers every future command

lease_scope_migration.rationale: Runtime approval enforcement spans Bureau policy code, installed runtime effects and versioned operator automation.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks
